system.flavor: With catlike reflexes, you pounce, spurring allies to action.
system.effect:
Effect [X]: Adjacent foes are pushed 1, then adjacent allies and allied summons may dash 2 (5+) 4 spaces. Then, any foe adjacent to one or more allies or summons that moved this way takes 2 damage, or 2d3 damage if they're in crisis. Then gain haste.
Heavy all allies, foes, and summons in range 1-2.
